message:
web: Improve Shell task rendering with syntax highlighting

- Use CodeBlock component for bash command highlighting
- Add ShellOutput component that detects and highlights git diff sections
- Remove labels (Command, Output, No output) for cleaner UI
- Fix string output handling for error messages
- Remove padding from diffs.com code blocks
